## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (analyzer, reporter, ingestor)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor or chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] New behavior has a test.
- [ ] README or spec.md updated if public behavior changed.
- [ ] No em dashes in prose files.
